mapper.select:
SELECT D.DAEMON_ID AS daemonId, D.DAEMON_CD AS daemonCd, D.DAEMON_NM AS daemonNm, D.DAEMON_DESC AS daemonDesc, D.DAEMON_STAT_CD AS daemonStatCd, D.DAEMON_RESTART_YN AS daemonRestartYn, D.DAEMON_USE_YN AS daemonUseYn, C.DETAIL_NM AS daemonStatNm, D.DAEMON_START_PATH AS daemonStartPath, D.DAEMON_STOP_PATH AS daemonStopPath, D.DAEMON_RESTART_PATH AS daemonRestartPath, substring(D.HEARTBEAT_TIME, 1, 19) AS heartbeatTime FROM mhdb.TB_DAEMON D LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C ON D.DAEMON_STAT_CD = C.DETAIL_CD AND 'DAEMON_STAT_CD' = C.GROUP_CD WHERE 1=1
AND D.DAEMON_USE_YN like concat('%', #{useYn}, '%')
AND D.DAEMON_ID = (#{daemonId})::integer
AND UPPER(D.DAEMON_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND UPPER(D.DAEMON_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND UPPER(D.DAEMON_START_PATH) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND UPPER(D.DAEMON_STOP_PATH) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND UPPER(D.DAEMON_RESTART_PATH) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND UPPER(D.DAEMON_DESC) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND ( UPPER(D.DAEMON_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' OR UPPER(D.DAEMON_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' OR UPPER(D.DAEMON_START_PATH) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' OR UPPER(D.DAEMON_STOP_PATH) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' OR UPPER(D.DAEMON_RESTART_PATH) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' OR UPPER(D.DAEMON_DESC) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' )
ORDER BY D.DAEMON_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_DAEMON ( DAEMON_CD, DAEMON_NM, DAEMON_DESC, DAEMON_STAT_CD, DAEMON_RESTART_YN, DAEMON_USE_YN, HEARTBEAT_TIME, DAEMON_START_PATH, DAEMON_STOP_PATH, DAEMON_RESTART_PATH ) VALUES ( #{daemon_cd}, #{daemon_nm}, #{daemon_desc}, '1', '', #{use_yn}, now(), #{daemon_start_path}, #{daemon_stop_path}, #{daemon_restart_path} )
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_DAEMON SET DAEMON_NM = #{daemon_nm}, DAEMON_CD = #{daemon_cd}, DAEMON_DESC = #{daemon_desc}, DAEMON_STAT_CD = #{daemon_stat_cd}, DAEMON_RESTART_YN = #{daemon_restart_yn}, DAEMON_USE_YN = #{use_yn}, DAEMON_START_PATH = #{daemon_start_path}, DAEMON_STOP_PATH = #{daemon_stop_path}, DAEMON_RESTART_PATH = #{daemon_restart_path} WHERE 1=1 AND DAEMON_ID = (#{daemon_id})::integer
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mhdb.TB_DAEMON WHERE 1=1 AND DAEMON_ID = (#{daemonId})::integer
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_DAEMON SET COMMAND = #{command} WHERE 1=1 AND DAEMON_ID = (#{daemonId})::integer
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_DAEMON_HIST ( DAEMON_ID, DAEMON_NM, CR_DATETIME, USER_ID, COMMAND ) VALUES ( #{daemonId}::integer, #{daemonNm}, now(), #{userId}, #{command} )
